description: A customer wants to increase the quantity of an item on an order that has not yet entered production.

nodes.task_description: Find the sales order and verify it is not yet in production.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the order and confirms its status allows for changes.

nodes.task_description: Update the quantity for the line item as requested by the customer.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent changes the quantity on the sales order line.

nodes.task_description: Send a revised order acknowledgement to the customer with the new total.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sends the updated confirmation to the customer.
